evals.prompt: How many characters are in the file skills/char-counter/SKILL.md?
evals.expected_output: A full summary block showing total characters, non-whitespace characters, and line count for SKILL.md, using the format with labeled rows.

assertions.text: Response includes 'Total characters:' label with a number
assertions.description: When asked directly about character count, skill specifies the full block format with this label

assertions.text: Response includes 'Non-whitespace characters:' label with a number
assertions.description: Full block format includes non-whitespace count

assertions.text: Response includes 'Lines:' label with a number
assertions.description: Full block format includes line count
SKILL.md has 48 lines; reported value should match

evals.prompt: Add a blank line at the end of skills/char-counter/SKILL.md
evals.expected_output: The file is edited, and the response ends with a one-line character count summary in the format: 📄 SKILL.md: X,XXX chars | X,XXX non-whitespace | XXX lines

assertions.text: The response includes the 📄 emoji char count summary line
assertions.description: After any file edit, skill requires a one-line summary appended to the response

assertions.text: The summary line contains 'chars', 'non-whitespace', and 'lines' separated by |
assertions.description: Specific one-liner format: '📄 <filename>: X,XXX chars | X,XXX non-whitespace | XXX lines'

assertions.text: The summary line appears after the description of the edit, not before
assertions.description: Skill says to append the summary at the end of the response

evals.prompt: Show me the character counts for all the .md files under skills/char-counter/
evals.expected_output: A multi-file report listing each .md file with its counts, plus a total row at the bottom.

assertions.text: SKILL.md appears in the output with character counts
assertions.description: SKILL.md is the primary .md file under skills/char-counter/

assertions.text: The output includes a total or summary row aggregating across all files
assertions.description: Skill specifies: for multiple files, report each on its own line with a total row

assertions.text: Each file entry includes at least a character count
assertions.description: Each file should have at least the total character count reported
